Vitalik Buterin Breaks Silence On Ethereum L2 Design, Here’s All
articles.description: Key Insights: Vitalik Buterin, Ethereum co-founder, has reiterated his beliefs in the approach that developers need to take regarding the creation of Layer2 (L2) systems. Buterin stated the need to reduce complexity in L2 architecture and depend more robustly on the base security properties of Ethereum Layer1 (L1).
